emma_holiday_pdf.label: Emma Holiday PDF
emma_holiday_pdf.notes: Profile-style source: emits shared normalized chunks first, then invokes the existing Emma generator unchanged.

uworld_notes.label: UWorld Notes
uworld_notes.notes: v4.59: text-only UWorld notes (.txt .md .rtf .docx). High-yield density — the runner auto-scales --questions-per-file to ~1 question per 150 chars with a floor of 8 questions (so a 3-page UWorld note lands at ~9-10 questions and a multi-thousand-line note hits the MAX clamp of 80). The user explicitly asked for more rigorous testing density on UWorld because the notes are high-yield Step 2 material. Override by passing --questions-per-file explicitly. Live mode requires GEMINI_API_KEY.

mehlman_pdf.label: Mehlman PDF
mehlman_pdf.notes: Profile-style text-heavy PDF source: emits shared normalized text chunks, then invokes the existing Mehlman generator unchanged. v4.58 removes the prior 10-page validation cap so the full PDF is processed end-to-end; pair with v4.58 tight-focus chunking (1.5K chars / chunk, 1 question / chunk) and deterministic page-proximity image attachment.

images_tables_source.label: Images & Tables

dryRunSteps.stageLabel: Images & Tables shared-ingestion dry-run (attachment-first stub, no Gemini)

liveSteps.stageLabel: Images & Tables live Gemini generation (per-image NBME-style questions)

images_tables_source.notes: Live mode runs per-image Gemini classification + NBME-style question generation via tools/images-tables-question-generator/generate_images_tables_questions.py. Each Gemini call classifies the screenshot as diagnostic_stem_image, explanation_only_image, explanation_only_table, or unclear_skip. Diagnostic images that require interpretation go in q.images[] (stem); explanation-only images and ALL tables/charts go in q.explanationImages[] (explanation). Dry-run emits the prior attachment-first stub (no Gemini). Requires GEMINI_API_KEY. Selecting multiple files queues one generator call per file; selecting a folder scans it for supported image extensions.

anki_notes.label: Anki Notes
anki_notes.notes: Live Gemini Anki generation enabled. Dry-run produces placeholder questions; live runs Gemini to generate real questions (defaults to 15 per file via generate_anki_questions.py --questions-per-file). Requires GEMINI_API_KEY.

ome_pdf.label: OME PDF
ome_pdf.advancedModeLabel: Advanced Mode (v5.2 multi-stage organic pipeline — higher quality, ~4x cost)
ome_pdf.notes: Live Gemini OME generation enabled. Dry-run produces placeholder questions; live runs Gemini to generate real clinical questions from the full PDF. Requires GEMINI_API_KEY. Advanced Mode (--v5) engages the v5.2 multi-stage organic pipeline (kernel-first design + 4 trap categories + adversarial verification + per-distractor scoring + length parity).

divine_transcript.label: Divine (Audio + Transcript)

liveSteps.stageLabel: Divine live generation (audio → transcribe → clean → questions)

divine_transcript.notes: Accepts Divine Intervention podcast audio (.mp3/.m4a/.wav) and transcripts (.txt/.md). Dry-run handles text inputs only (audio dry-run is rejected to avoid wasting transcription tokens). Live mode runs the full pipeline: Gemini File API upload → transcribe → clean → chunk → generate (sourceFormat=divine-audio, schemaVersion=nbme-gemini-json-v3). Requires GEMINI_API_KEY.

fast_facts_pptx.label: Fast Facts PPTX
fast_facts_pptx.notes: Uses the existing FAST_FACTS_PROFILE in the lecture-slide generator. Live generation does not apply a question or slide cap unless explicitly requested.

amboss_pdf.label: AMBOSS PDF
amboss_pdf.notes: AMBOSS QBank PDF (browser screenshot export). Tesseract OCR groups pages into questions and routes click-to-enlarge image pages to explanations; one Gemini call per question extracts clean choices, correct answer, explanations, and review pearl. ~8 calls / ~$0.10 per typical PDF.

nbme_pdf.label: NBME PDF
nbme_pdf.notes: v4.61 dual-PDF orchestrator. Upload Q-PDF + A-PDF (preferred — cleanest stems + canonical explanations), Q-PDF only (Gemini generates explanations + review pearl + educational objective), or a single combined PDF with inline answers (legacy v4.60 path). Auto-detects file roles by filename + content sniff, auto-detects screenshot PDFs, joins by question number (handles out-of-order A-PDFs). Gemini multimodal figure detection fires only on pages where the stem contains image-language OR PyMuPDF reports embedded raster images — cheap when not needed. Aspect-ratio guard 0.30-3.00 rejects whole-page-as-image false positives.

uworld_notes.notes: Existing external notes pipeline exists, but it is not part of the initial Batch Import Center registry.
